name: prompt registry validator rejects a duplicate prompt id within the same registry file
command:
mkdir -p prompts && printf 'prompts:
  - id: dup
    versions: []
  - id: dup
    versions: []
' > prompts/registry.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/prompts/validate-registry.sh" --registry prompts/registry.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'duplicate_id=dup' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
